subcodes.first_line: O dearly beloved friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Your letter was read, and from your congratulations and felicitations the utmost joy was obtained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عزیز عبدالبهاء نامه شما قرائت شد از تبریک و تهنیت نهایت مسرت حاصل
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @thankfulness; gratitude, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
